race.comment: PEACH GALANTES (12) progressed nicely last time out to finish just a neck from the winner in second over 1400m at Gatton. Suitably placed so she can figure again. TRUSTY BANDIT (7) settled well back when ninth over 2000m at Toowoomba two weeks ago. Tackling a more suitable race this time so he is a major player. KINDLY (10) did little and finished ninth over 1600m at Gatton last start. Best form stacks up and worth another chance. TORVECCHIO (9) could only manage sixth over 1300m at Toowoomba last start. Should be peaking now and may be ready to show more. Include in multiples. GOLD DAZZLER (3) has appeal on best.
